journey.name: NDC — AirShopping + OfferPrice + ServiceList + OrderCreate + OrderRetrieve (IATA NDC 21.3)
journey.description: Validates the IATA NDC 21.3 AirShopping, OfferPrice, ServiceList, OrderCreate, and OrderRetrieve endpoints on the Retail API. Steps 1–6 cover AirShopping: well-formed requests with single and multiple passenger types, a past-date search returning an empty OffersGroup, and negative cases. Steps 7–11 cover OfferPrice: the OfferID captured in step 1 is forwarded to price the offer, including a traveler-typed request, then negative cases for an unknown ID, missing SelectedOffer, and empty body. Steps 12–16 cover ServiceList just before order creation: the happy path exercises all SSRs with no context filter, offer-scoped SSRs using the OfferID from step 1, and cabin-filtered SSRs; negative cases cover invalid XML and empty body. Steps 17–21 cover OrderCreate: step 17 creates a confirmed order using the OfferID from step 1, and steps 18–21 cover missing OrderItems, unknown offer, invalid XML, and empty body. Steps 22–26 cover OrderRetrieve: step 22 retrieves the order created in step 17 using its booking reference and the passenger surname from that step, then negative cases cover an unknown booking reference, a wrong surname, a missing BookingRef/ID element, and an empty body.

steps.name: AirShopping — 1 ADT, LHR→JFK
steps.description: Posts a valid IATA_AirShoppingRQ for one adult passenger from LHR to JFK on tomorrow's date. Expects a 200 response containing a well-formed IATA_AirShoppingRS with ShoppingResponseID, OffersGroup, and DataLists. The first OfferID from the response is captured and forwarded to the OfferPrice steps.

request.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<IATA_AirShoppingRQ xmlns="http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/00/2021.3/IATA_AirShoppingRQ">
  <Document>
    <Name>Apex Air NDC Test Harness</Name>
    <ReferenceVersion>21.3</ReferenceVersion>
  </Document>
  <Party>
    <Sender>
      <TravelAgencySender>
        <AgencyID>TEST001</AgencyID>
        <Name>Test OTA</Name>
      </TravelAgencySender>
    </Sender>
    <Recipient>
      <AirlineRecipient>
        <AirlineDesigCode>AX</AirlineDesigCode>
      </AirlineRecipient>
    </Recipient>
  </Party>
  <Travelers>
    <Traveler>
      <AnonymousTraveler>
        <PTC>ADT</PTC>
        <Quantity>1</Quantity>
      </AnonymousTraveler>
    </Traveler>
  </Travelers>
  <CoreQuery>
    <OriginDestinations>
      <OriginDestination>
        <Departure>
          <AirportCode>LHR</AirportCode>
          <Date>__RAND_DEPART_DATE__</Date>
        </Departure>
        <Arrival>
          <AirportCode>JFK</AirportCode>
        </Arrival>
      </OriginDestination>
    </OriginDestinations>
  </CoreQuery>
</IATA_AirShoppingRQ>

expected.description: Returns 200 with a well-formed IATA_AirShoppingRS containing ShoppingResponseID, OffersGroup, and DataLists. The first OfferID is extracted for use in OfferPrice steps.
expected.validationNotes: Response Content-Type must be application/xml. The root element must be IATA_AirShoppingRS with namespace http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/00/2021.3/IATA_AirShoppingRS. Each Offer's OfferID is the internal offerId GUID usable for OfferPrice.

steps.name: AirShopping — 2 ADT + 1 CHD
steps.description: Posts a valid IATA_AirShoppingRQ for two adults and one child from LHR to JFK on tomorrow's date. Expects the DataLists/AnonymousTravelerList to contain two entries — one per passenger type group.

request.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<IATA_AirShoppingRQ xmlns="http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/00/2021.3/IATA_AirShoppingRQ">
  <Document>
    <Name>Apex Air NDC Test Harness</Name>
    <ReferenceVersion>21.3</ReferenceVersion>
  </Document>
  <Party>
    <Sender>
      <TravelAgencySender>
        <AgencyID>TEST001</AgencyID>
        <Name>Test OTA</Name>
      </TravelAgencySender>
    </Sender>
    <Recipient>
      <AirlineRecipient>
        <AirlineDesigCode>AX</AirlineDesigCode>
      </AirlineRecipient>
    </Recipient>
  </Party>
  <Travelers>
    <Traveler>
      <AnonymousTraveler>
        <PTC>ADT</PTC>
        <Quantity>2</Quantity>
      </AnonymousTraveler>
    </Traveler>
    <Traveler>
      <AnonymousTraveler>
        <PTC>CHD</PTC>
        <Quantity>1</Quantity>
      </AnonymousTraveler>
    </Traveler>
  </Travelers>
  <CoreQuery>
    <OriginDestinations>
      <OriginDestination>
        <Departure>
          <AirportCode>LHR</AirportCode>
          <Date>__RAND_DEPART_DATE__</Date>
        </Departure>
        <Arrival>
          <AirportCode>JFK</AirportCode>
        </Arrival>
      </OriginDestination>
    </OriginDestinations>
  </CoreQuery>
</IATA_AirShoppingRQ>

expected.description: Returns 200. DataLists/AnonymousTravelerList contains one entry per passenger type group (ADT with Quantity 2, CHD with Quantity 1).
expected.validationNotes: Each AnonymousTraveler in the DataLists reflects the PTC and Quantity from the request, not individual passenger instances.

steps.name: AirShopping — past date (no inventory)
steps.description: Posts a valid IATA_AirShoppingRQ for a past date (2020-01-01) on the LHR→JFK route. The endpoint always returns 200; no inventory exists for a past date so OffersGroup must contain no Offer elements.

request.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<IATA_AirShoppingRQ xmlns="http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/00/2021.3/IATA_AirShoppingRQ">
  <Document>
    <Name>Apex Air NDC Test Harness</Name>
    <ReferenceVersion>21.3</ReferenceVersion>
  </Document>
  <Party>
    <Sender>
      <TravelAgencySender>
        <AgencyID>TEST001</AgencyID>
        <Name>Test OTA</Name>
      </TravelAgencySender>
    </Sender>
    <Recipient>
      <AirlineRecipient>
        <AirlineDesigCode>AX</AirlineDesigCode>
      </AirlineRecipient>
    </Recipient>
  </Party>
  <Travelers>
    <Traveler>
      <AnonymousTraveler>
        <PTC>ADT</PTC>
        <Quantity>1</Quantity>
      </AnonymousTraveler>
    </Traveler>
  </Travelers>
  <CoreQuery>
    <OriginDestinations>
      <OriginDestination>
        <Departure>
          <AirportCode>LHR</AirportCode>
          <Date>2020-01-01</Date>
        </Departure>
        <Arrival>
          <AirportCode>JFK</AirportCode>
        </Arrival>
      </OriginDestination>
    </OriginDestinations>
  </CoreQuery>
</IATA_AirShoppingRQ>

expected.description: Returns 200 with an empty OffersGroup — no inventory exists for a past departure date.
expected.validationNotes: The endpoint never returns 404 for a no-results search. An empty OffersGroup is the correct NDC representation of no available offers.

steps.name: AirShopping — missing CoreQuery → 400
steps.description: Posts an IATA_AirShoppingRQ that omits the CoreQuery element. The parser cannot determine origin, destination, or departure date and must return 400 with an NDC Errors element containing Code ERR_PARSE.

request.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<IATA_AirShoppingRQ xmlns="http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/00/2021.3/IATA_AirShoppingRQ">
  <Document>
    <Name>Apex Air NDC Test Harness</Name>
    <ReferenceVersion>21.3</ReferenceVersion>
  </Document>
  <Travelers>
    <Traveler>
      <AnonymousTraveler>
        <PTC>ADT</PTC>
        <Quantity>1</Quantity>
      </AnonymousTraveler>
    </Traveler>
  </Travelers>
</IATA_AirShoppingRQ>

expected.description: Returns 400 with an IATA_AirShoppingRS containing an Errors/Error element with Code ERR_PARSE.
expected.validationNotes: The response Content-Type must still be application/xml even on error. The Errors element follows the NDC schema structure.

steps.name: AirShopping — invalid XML → 400
steps.description: Posts a body that is not valid XML. The endpoint must return 400; it cannot parse the document at all.

request.body: this is not xml << >

expected.description: Returns 400 when the request body cannot be parsed as XML.
expected.validationNotes: The endpoint must reject any body that is not well-formed XML, regardless of content.

steps.name: AirShopping — empty body → 400
steps.description: Posts an empty body. The endpoint must return 400 with an NDC Errors element containing Code ERR_EMPTY_BODY.

response.body: 21.3 ERR_EMPTY_BODY Request body must not be empty. EN

expected.description: Returns 400 when the request body is empty.
expected.validationNotes: The Errors/Error element must have Code ERR_EMPTY_BODY.

steps.name: OfferPrice — price offer from step 1
steps.description: Posts a valid IATA_OfferPriceRQ using the OfferID captured from the step 1 AirShoppingRS. The Offer microservice re-validates and re-prices the stored offer. Expects a 200 IATA_OfferPriceRS with PricedOffer (containing OfferID, TotalPrice, OfferItem, and OfferExpiration) and DataLists (FlightSegmentList and OriginDestinationList). Depends on step 1 returning at least one offer.

request.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<IATA_OfferPriceRQ xmlns="http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/00/2021.3/IATA_OfferPriceRQ">
  <Document>
    <Name>Apex Air NDC Test Harness</Name>
    <ReferenceVersion>21.3</ReferenceVersion>
  </Document>
  <Party>
    <Sender>
      <TravelAgencySender>
        <AgencyID>TEST001</AgencyID>
        <Name>Test OTA</Name>
      </TravelAgencySender>
    </Sender>
    <Recipient>
      <AirlineRecipient>
        <AirlineDesigCode>AX</AirlineDesigCode>
      </AirlineRecipient>
    </Recipient>
  </Party>
  <SelectedOffer>
    <OfferRefID>__CHAIN_ndcOfferId__</OfferRefID>
    <OwnerCode>AX</OwnerCode>
  </SelectedOffer>
</IATA_OfferPriceRQ>

expected.description: Returns 200 with a well-formed IATA_OfferPriceRS. PricedOffer contains the repriced fare with OfferExpiration. DataLists contains the flight segment and origin-destination for the priced flight.
expected.validationNotes: Root element must be IATA_OfferPriceRS with namespace http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/00/2021.3/IATA_OfferPriceRS. PricedOffer/OfferID must equal the OfferRefID sent in the request. OfferExpiration/DateTime must be a valid ISO 8601 UTC timestamp. OfferItem/TotalPriceDetail must include BaseAmount and Taxes/Total.

steps.name: OfferPrice — with ADT + CHD travelers
steps.description: Posts the same OfferPriceRQ as step 7 but includes a Travelers block with 2 ADT and 1 CHD. Expects a 200 IATA_OfferPriceRS where DataLists/AnonymousTravelerList reflects both passenger type groups, and OfferItem/PassengerRefs references both traveler keys.

request.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<IATA_OfferPriceRQ xmlns="http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/00/2021.3/IATA_OfferPriceRQ">
  <Document>
    <Name>Apex Air NDC Test Harness</Name>
    <ReferenceVersion>21.3</ReferenceVersion>
  </Document>
  <Party>
    <Sender>
      <TravelAgencySender>
        <AgencyID>TEST001</AgencyID>
        <Name>Test OTA</Name>
      </TravelAgencySender>
    </Sender>
    <Recipient>
      <AirlineRecipient>
        <AirlineDesigCode>AX</AirlineDesigCode>
      </AirlineRecipient>
    </Recipient>
  </Party>
  <Travelers>
    <Traveler>
      <AnonymousTraveler>
        <PTC>ADT</PTC>
        <Quantity>2</Quantity>
      </AnonymousTraveler>
    </Traveler>
    <Traveler>
      <AnonymousTraveler>
        <PTC>CHD</PTC>
        <Quantity>1</Quantity>
      </AnonymousTraveler>
    </Traveler>
  </Travelers>
  <SelectedOffer>
    <OfferRefID>__CHAIN_ndcOfferId__</OfferRefID>
    <OwnerCode>AX</OwnerCode>
  </SelectedOffer>
</IATA_OfferPriceRQ>

expected.description: Returns 200. DataLists/AnonymousTravelerList contains one entry per passenger type group (ADT Quantity 2, CHD Quantity 1). OfferItem/PassengerRefs references both traveler keys.
expected.validationNotes: AnonymousTravelerList is only emitted when Travelers are present in the request. Each entry reflects the PTC and Quantity from the request.

steps.name: OfferPrice — unknown OfferRefID → 404
steps.description: Posts an IATA_OfferPriceRQ with a randomly generated GUID that does not correspond to any stored offer. Expects 404 with an IATA_OfferPriceRS Errors element containing Code ERR_OFFER_NOT_FOUND.

request.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<IATA_OfferPriceRQ xmlns="http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/00/2021.3/IATA_OfferPriceRQ">
  <Document>
    <Name>Apex Air NDC Test Harness</Name>
    <ReferenceVersion>21.3</ReferenceVersion>
  </Document>
  <SelectedOffer>
    <OfferRefID>00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000</OfferRefID>
    <OwnerCode>AX</OwnerCode>
  </SelectedOffer>
</IATA_OfferPriceRQ>

expected.description: Returns 404 with an IATA_OfferPriceRS containing Errors/Error with Code ERR_OFFER_NOT_FOUND.
expected.validationNotes: The nil GUID (all zeros) is a valid GUID that will never match a real stored offer. The response namespace must be IATA_OfferPriceRS, not IATA_AirShoppingRS.

steps.name: OfferPrice — missing SelectedOffer → 400
steps.description: Posts an IATA_OfferPriceRQ that omits the SelectedOffer element entirely. The parser cannot determine which offer to price and must return 400 with an NDC Errors element containing Code ERR_PARSE.

request.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<IATA_OfferPriceRQ xmlns="http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/00/2021.3/IATA_OfferPriceRQ">
  <Document>
    <Name>Apex Air NDC Test Harness</Name>
    <ReferenceVersion>21.3</ReferenceVersion>
  </Document>
</IATA_OfferPriceRQ>

expected.description: Returns 400 with an IATA_OfferPriceRS containing Errors/Error with Code ERR_PARSE.
expected.validationNotes: The SelectedOffer element is mandatory. Its absence must produce a parse error, not a 500.

steps.name: OfferPrice — empty body → 400
steps.description: Posts an empty body to the OfferPrice endpoint. Must return 400 with an IATA_OfferPriceRS Errors element containing Code ERR_EMPTY_BODY.

response.body: 21.3 ERR_EMPTY_BODY Request body must not be empty. EN

expected.description: Returns 400 when the request body is empty.
expected.validationNotes: The response must use the IATA_OfferPriceRS namespace, not IATA_AirShoppingRS. Code must be ERR_EMPTY_BODY.

steps.name: ServiceList — all SSRs (no offer context)
steps.description: Posts a minimal IATA_ServiceListRQ with no OfferRefID or cabin filter. The SSR Catalogue returns all active services. Expects a 200 IATA_ServiceListRS with Response/ServiceList/ALaCarteOffer (Owner=AX, at least one ALaCarteOfferItem) and Response/DataLists/ServiceDefinitionList.

request.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<IATA_ServiceListRQ xmlns="http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/00/2021.3/IATA_ServiceListRQ">
  <Document>
    <Name>Apex Air NDC Test Harness</Name>
    <ReferenceVersion>21.3</ReferenceVersion>
  </Document>
  <Party>
    <Sender>
      <TravelAgencySender>
        <AgencyID>TEST001</AgencyID>
        <Name>Test OTA</Name>
      </TravelAgencySender>
    </Sender>
    <Recipient>
      <AirlineRecipient>
        <AirlineDesigCode>AX</AirlineDesigCode>
      </AirlineRecipient>
    </Recipient>
  </Party>
  <Travelers>
    <Traveler>
      <AnonymousTraveler>
        <PTC>ADT</PTC>
        <Quantity>1</Quantity>
      </AnonymousTraveler>
    </Traveler>
  </Travelers>
  <Query />
</IATA_ServiceListRQ>

expected.description: Returns 200 with IATA_ServiceListRS. ALaCarteOffer/Owner must be AX. Each ALaCarteOfferItem has OfferItemID prefixed SLI-, a ServiceCode, and UnitPriceDetail with an indicative price of 0.00 GBP. DataLists/ServiceDefinitionList contains a corresponding ServiceDefinition per SSR.
expected.validationNotes: Response Content-Type must be application/xml. Document/ReferenceVersion must be 21.3. ServiceDefinitionID must be prefixed SD-.

steps.name: ServiceList — filtered by OfferID from step 1
steps.description: Posts an IATA_ServiceListRQ with the OfferRefID captured from step 1. The handler resolves the stored offer to derive the operating cabin class and flight number and passes them as filters to the SSR Catalogue. Expects a 200 IATA_ServiceListRS with contextually relevant services.

request.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<IATA_ServiceListRQ xmlns="http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/00/2021.3/IATA_ServiceListRQ">
  <Document>
    <Name>Apex Air NDC Test Harness</Name>
    <ReferenceVersion>21.3</ReferenceVersion>
  </Document>
  <Party>
    <Sender>
      <TravelAgencySender>
        <AgencyID>TEST001</AgencyID>
        <Name>Test OTA</Name>
      </TravelAgencySender>
    </Sender>
    <Recipient>
      <AirlineRecipient>
        <AirlineDesigCode>AX</AirlineDesigCode>
      </AirlineRecipient>
    </Recipient>
  </Party>
  <Travelers>
    <Traveler>
      <AnonymousTraveler>
        <PTC>ADT</PTC>
        <Quantity>1</Quantity>
      </AnonymousTraveler>
    </Traveler>
  </Travelers>
  <Query>
    <SelectionCriteria>
      <OfferRef>
        <OfferRefID>__CHAIN_ndcOfferId__</OfferRefID>
      </OfferRef>
    </SelectionCriteria>
  </Query>
</IATA_ServiceListRQ>

expected.description: Returns 200 with IATA_ServiceListRS. Services are filtered by the cabin class and flight number derived from the stored offer referenced by OfferRefID.
expected.validationNotes: Depends on step 1 returning a valid OfferID. If the offer has already expired this step will still return 200 with an unfiltered catalogue.

steps.name: ServiceList — cabin code filter (Economy)
steps.description: Posts an IATA_ServiceListRQ with CabinPreferences/CabinType/CabinTypeCode/Code set to M (NDC Economy, maps to internal cabin Y). The SSR Catalogue is queried with the derived cabin filter. Expects a 200 IATA_ServiceListRS.

request.body: Apex Air NDC Test Harness 21.3 TEST001 Test OTA AX ADT 1 M

expected.description: Returns 200 with IATA_ServiceListRS. NDC cabin code M is mapped to internal cabin Y (Economy) before the SSR Catalogue query.
expected.validationNotes: NDC cabin code mapping: M=Economy(Y), W=PremiumEconomy(W), C=Business(J), F=First(F).

steps.name: ServiceList — invalid XML → 400
steps.description: Posts a body that is not valid XML. The endpoint must return 400 with an IATA_ServiceListRS Errors element containing Code ERR_PARSE.

request.body: this is not xml << >

expected.description: Returns 400 with an IATA_ServiceListRS Errors/Error element with Code ERR_PARSE.
expected.validationNotes: Error envelope must use the IATA_ServiceListRS namespace, not IATA_AirShoppingRS.

steps.name: ServiceList — empty body → 400
steps.description: Posts an empty body to the ServiceList endpoint. Must return 400 with an IATA_ServiceListRS Errors element containing Code ERR_EMPTY_BODY.

response.body: 21.3 ERR_EMPTY_BODY Request body must not be empty. EN

expected.description: Returns 400 when the request body is empty.
expected.validationNotes: Code must be ERR_EMPTY_BODY. Namespace must be IATA_ServiceListRS.

steps.name: OrderCreate — create confirmed order from step 1 offer
steps.description: Posts a valid IATA_OrderCreateRQ using the OfferID captured from step 1. Includes one ADT passenger with full name, date of birth, gender, contact details, and a test Visa card. Expects 201 Created with an IATA_OrderCreateRS containing Response/Order (StatusCode=ISSUED, BookingRef with AirlineDesigCode=AX, TotalAmount, at least one OrderItem with StatusCode=PAYMENT_DONE) and DataLists (FlightSegmentList, OriginDestinationList, PaxList).

request.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<IATA_OrderCreateRQ xmlns="http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/00/2021.3/IATA_OrderCreateRQ">
  <Document>
    <Name>Apex Air NDC Test Harness</Name>
    <ReferenceVersion>21.3</ReferenceVersion>
  </Document>
  <Party>
    <Sender>
      <TravelAgencySender>
        <AgencyID>TEST001</AgencyID>
        <Name>Test OTA</Name>
      </TravelAgencySender>
    </Sender>
    <Recipient>
      <AirlineRecipient>
        <AirlineDesigCode>AX</AirlineDesigCode>
      </AirlineRecipient>
    </Recipient>
  </Party>
  <Query>
    <OrderItems>
      <OfferItem>
        <OfferItemRefID>ITEM-1</OfferItemRefID>
        <OfferRefID>__CHAIN_ndcOfferId__</OfferRefID>
      </OfferItem>
    </OrderItems>
    <DataLists>
      <PaxList>
        <Pax>
          <PaxID>PAX1</PaxID>
          <PTC>ADT</PTC>
          <Individual>
            <Birthdate>__RAND_DOB__</Birthdate>
            <GenderCode>__RAND_GENDER_CODE__</GenderCode>
            <GivenName>__RAND_GIVEN_NAME__</GivenName>
            <Surname>__RAND_SURNAME__</Surname>
          </Individual>
          <ContactInfoRefID>CI-PAX1</ContactInfoRefID>
        </Pax>
      </PaxList>
      <ContactInfoList>
        <ContactInfo>
          <ContactInfoID>CI-PAX1</ContactInfoID>
          <EmailAddress>
            <EmailAddressText>__RAND_EMAIL__</EmailAddressText>
          </EmailAddress>
          <Phone>
            <PhoneNumber>__RAND_PHONE__</PhoneNumber>
          </Phone>
        </ContactInfo>
      </ContactInfoList>
    </DataLists>
    <Payments>
      <Payment>
        <Method>
          <PaymentCard>
            <CardHolderName>__RAND_GIVEN_NAME__ __RAND_SURNAME__</CardHolderName>
            <CardNumber>
              <Applicability>FullCard</Applicability>
              <PlainCardNumber>4111111111111111</PlainCardNumber>
            </CardNumber>
            <CardTypeCode>VI</CardTypeCode>
            <Expiry>
              <Month>12</Month>
              <Year>2030</Year>
            </Expiry>
            <SeriesCode>
              <Applicability>CVV</Applicability>
              <Value>123</Value>
            </SeriesCode>
          </PaymentCard>
        </Method>
      </Payment>
    </Payments>
  </Query>
</IATA_OrderCreateRQ>

expected.description: Returns 201 Created with a well-formed IATA_OrderCreateRS. Order/StatusCode must be ISSUED. BookingRef/BookingEntity/Carrier/AirlineDesigCode must be AX. At least one OrderItem with StatusCode=PAYMENT_DONE. DataLists contains FlightSegmentList, OriginDestinationList, and PaxList reflecting the submitted passenger.
expected.validationNotes: Root element must be IATA_OrderCreateRS with namespace http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/00/2021.3/IATA_OrderCreateRS. Depends on step 1 returning a valid OfferID. The offer is consumed by this step — subsequent OrderCreate calls with the same OfferID will return 404.

steps.name: OrderCreate — missing OrderItems → 400
steps.description: Posts an IATA_OrderCreateRQ that omits the Query/OrderItems element. The parser cannot determine which offer to book and must return 400 with an IATA_OrderCreateRS Errors element containing Code ERR_PARSE.

request.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<IATA_OrderCreateRQ xmlns="http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/00/2021.3/IATA_OrderCreateRQ">
  <Document><ReferenceVersion>21.3</ReferenceVersion></Document>
  <Query>
    <DataLists>
      <PaxList>
        <Pax>
          <PaxID>PAX1</PaxID>
          <PTC>ADT</PTC>
          <Individual><GivenName>Test</GivenName><Surname>User</Surname></Individual>
        </Pax>
      </PaxList>
    </DataLists>
  </Query>
</IATA_OrderCreateRQ>

expected.description: Returns 400 with an IATA_OrderCreateRS Errors/Error element with Code ERR_PARSE when OrderItems is absent.
expected.validationNotes: OrderItems/OfferItem/OfferRefID is a mandatory field. Its absence must produce ERR_PARSE, not a 500.

steps.name: OrderCreate — unknown OfferRefID → 404
steps.description: Posts a well-formed IATA_OrderCreateRQ with a randomly generated GUID that does not correspond to any stored offer. Expects 404 with an IATA_OrderCreateRS Errors element containing Code ERR_OFFER_NOT_FOUND.

request.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<IATA_OrderCreateRQ xmlns="http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/00/2021.3/IATA_OrderCreateRQ">
  <Document><ReferenceVersion>21.3</ReferenceVersion></Document>
  <Query>
    <OrderItems>
      <OfferItem>
        <OfferItemRefID>ITEM-1</OfferItemRefID>
        <OfferRefID>00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000</OfferRefID>
      </OfferItem>
    </OrderItems>
    <DataLists>
      <PaxList>
        <Pax>
          <PaxID>PAX1</PaxID>
          <PTC>ADT</PTC>
          <Individual><GivenName>Test</GivenName><Surname>User</Surname></Individual>
        </Pax>
      </PaxList>
    </DataLists>
  </Query>
</IATA_OrderCreateRQ>

expected.description: Returns 404 with an IATA_OrderCreateRS Errors/Error element with Code ERR_OFFER_NOT_FOUND.
expected.validationNotes: The nil GUID (all zeros) is a valid GUID that will never match a real stored offer. Response namespace must be IATA_OrderCreateRS.

steps.name: OrderCreate — invalid XML → 400
steps.description: Posts a body that is not valid XML. The endpoint must return 400 with an IATA_OrderCreateRS Errors element containing Code ERR_PARSE.

request.body: this is not xml << >

expected.description: Returns 400 when the request body cannot be parsed as XML.
expected.validationNotes: Any non-well-formed XML body must be rejected with 400.

steps.name: OrderCreate — empty body → 400
steps.description: Posts an empty body to the OrderCreate endpoint. Must return 400 with an IATA_OrderCreateRS Errors element containing Code ERR_EMPTY_BODY.

response.body: 21.3 ERR_EMPTY_BODY Request body must not be empty. EN

expected.description: Returns 400 when the request body is empty.
expected.validationNotes: Code must be ERR_EMPTY_BODY. Namespace must be IATA_OrderCreateRS.

steps.name: OrderRetrieve — retrieve order from step 17
steps.description: Posts a valid IATA_OrderRetrieveRQ using the booking reference captured from step 17 and the same passenger surname used in that step. Expects 200 with an IATA_OrderRetrieveRS containing Response/Order (OrderID, BookingRef with AirlineDesigCode=AX, StatusCode=ISSUED, TotalAmount, at least one OrderItem with StatusCode=PAYMENT_DONE, TicketDocInfo) and DataLists (FlightSegmentList, OriginDestinationList, PaxList). Depends on step 17 completing successfully.

request.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<IATA_OrderRetrieveRQ xmlns="http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/00/2021.3/IATA_OrderRetrieveRQ">
  <Document>
    <Name>Apex Air NDC Test Harness</Name>
    <ReferenceVersion>21.3</ReferenceVersion>
  </Document>
  <Party>
    <Sender>
      <TravelAgencySender>
        <AgencyID>TEST001</AgencyID>
        <Name>Test OTA</Name>
      </TravelAgencySender>
    </Sender>
    <Recipient>
      <AirlineRecipient>
        <AirlineDesigCode>AX</AirlineDesigCode>
      </AirlineRecipient>
    </Recipient>
  </Party>
  <Query>
    <Filters>
      <OrderFilter>
        <BookingRef>
          <BookingEntity>
            <Carrier>
              <AirlineDesigCode>AX</AirlineDesigCode>
            </Carrier>
          </BookingEntity>
          <ID>__CHAIN_ndcBookingRef__</ID>
        </BookingRef>
        <Pax>
          <Individual>
            <Surname>__RAND_SURNAME__</Surname>
          </Individual>
        </Pax>
      </OrderFilter>
    </Filters>
  </Query>
</IATA_OrderRetrieveRQ>

expected.description: Returns 200 with a well-formed IATA_OrderRetrieveRS. Order/StatusCode must be ISSUED. BookingRef/ID must match the booking reference from step 17. At least one OrderItem with StatusCode=PAYMENT_DONE. DataLists contains FlightSegmentList, OriginDestinationList, and PaxList.
expected.validationNotes: Root element must be IATA_OrderRetrieveRS with namespace http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/00/2021.3/IATA_OrderRetrieveRS. The surname in the request must match the lead passenger surname used in step 17 — the Order microservice performs surname validation before returning the order.

steps.name: OrderRetrieve — unknown booking reference → 404
steps.description: Posts a valid IATA_OrderRetrieveRQ with a booking reference that does not correspond to any order. Expects 404 with an IATA_OrderRetrieveRS Errors element containing Code ERR_ORDER_NOT_FOUND.

request.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<IATA_OrderRetrieveRQ xmlns="http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/00/2021.3/IATA_OrderRetrieveRQ">
  <Document>
    <Name>Apex Air NDC Test Harness</Name>
    <ReferenceVersion>21.3</ReferenceVersion>
  </Document>
  <Query>
    <Filters>
      <OrderFilter>
        <BookingRef>
          <BookingEntity>
            <Carrier>
              <AirlineDesigCode>AX</AirlineDesigCode>
            </Carrier>
          </BookingEntity>
          <ID>ZZZZZZ</ID>
        </BookingRef>
        <Pax>
          <Individual>
            <Surname>SMITH</Surname>
          </Individual>
        </Pax>
      </OrderFilter>
    </Filters>
  </Query>
</IATA_OrderRetrieveRQ>

expected.description: Returns 404 with an IATA_OrderRetrieveRS Errors/Error element with Code ERR_ORDER_NOT_FOUND when the booking reference does not match any order.
expected.validationNotes: The booking reference ZZZZZZ is chosen to be unlikely to match a real booking. Response namespace must be IATA_OrderRetrieveRS.

steps.name: OrderRetrieve — wrong surname → 404
steps.description: Posts an IATA_OrderRetrieveRQ with the correct booking reference from step 17 but a surname that does not match the lead passenger. The Order microservice validates the surname and returns 404 when it does not match. Expects 404 with Code ERR_ORDER_NOT_FOUND.

apiCall.note: BookingRef/ID chained from step 17; surname deliberately wrong

request.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<IATA_OrderRetrieveRQ xmlns="http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/00/2021.3/IATA_OrderRetrieveRQ">
  <Document>
    <Name>Apex Air NDC Test Harness</Name>
    <ReferenceVersion>21.3</ReferenceVersion>
  </Document>
  <Query>
    <Filters>
      <OrderFilter>
        <BookingRef>
          <BookingEntity>
            <Carrier>
              <AirlineDesigCode>AX</AirlineDesigCode>
            </Carrier>
          </BookingEntity>
          <ID>__CHAIN_ndcBookingRef__</ID>
        </BookingRef>
        <Pax>
          <Individual>
            <Surname>WRONGSURNAME</Surname>
          </Individual>
        </Pax>
      </OrderFilter>
    </Filters>
  </Query>
</IATA_OrderRetrieveRQ>

expected.description: Returns 404 when the surname does not match the lead passenger on the booking. The Order microservice validates the surname before returning order data; a mismatch is treated identically to an unknown booking reference.
expected.validationNotes: Surname validation prevents unauthorised retrieval of another passenger's booking. The error code ERR_ORDER_NOT_FOUND is used for both unknown references and surname mismatches to avoid leaking booking existence.

steps.name: OrderRetrieve — missing BookingRef/ID → 400
steps.description: Posts an IATA_OrderRetrieveRQ that omits the Query/Filters/OrderFilter/BookingRef/ID element. The parser cannot determine which booking to retrieve and must return 400 with Code ERR_PARSE.

request.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<IATA_OrderRetrieveRQ xmlns="http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/00/2021.3/IATA_OrderRetrieveRQ">
  <Document><ReferenceVersion>21.3</ReferenceVersion></Document>
  <Query>
    <Filters>
      <OrderFilter>
        <Pax>
          <Individual>
            <Surname>SMITH</Surname>
          </Individual>
        </Pax>
      </OrderFilter>
    </Filters>
  </Query>
</IATA_OrderRetrieveRQ>

expected.description: Returns 400 with an IATA_OrderRetrieveRS Errors/Error element with Code ERR_PARSE when BookingRef/ID is absent.
expected.validationNotes: BookingRef/ID is a mandatory field. Its absence must produce ERR_PARSE, not a 500. The response namespace must be IATA_OrderRetrieveRS.

steps.name: OrderRetrieve — empty body → 400
steps.description: Posts an empty body to the OrderRetrieve endpoint. Must return 400 with an IATA_OrderRetrieveRS Errors element containing Code ERR_EMPTY_BODY.

response.body: 21.3 ERR_EMPTY_BODY Request body must not be empty. EN

expected.description: Returns 400 when the request body is empty.
expected.validationNotes: Code must be ERR_EMPTY_BODY. Namespace must be IATA_OrderRetrieveRS.
